research_note.summary: The admitted source-span locator candidate pilot completed one DeepSeek V4 Pro non-streaming call on the approved second-source excerpt. The model emitted locator coordinates and local code computed quote hashes from usable candidate offsets, but strict locator review is still pending.
what_worked: DeepSeek V4 Pro with thinking disabled produced parseable compact JSON in one admitted source-span locator candidate batch.
The output included the four expected top-level sections and three locator candidates.
All three model-proposed character offset ranges were usable for local quote-hash computation without committing source text.

The committed records preserve provider/model, prompt/config, source-hash, token/cost, trace-storage, locator-coordinate, and local quote-hash metadata without committing raw source or provider payloads.
what_failed: No method success is claimed; locator correctness was not evaluated by this boundary review.
Manual strict locator review has not yet judged whether approximate or broad locator labels are warranted by the local source.
The run intentionally omitted broad judgment abstraction and cross-method comparison prose, so those dimensions remain outside this artifact.
negative_results: A structurally complete locator-candidate artifact is still proposal-only and does not validate trading claims or source interpretation quality.
Model-proposed line and character offsets are candidates until manually checked.
Locally computed quote hashes only prove what local span was hashed; they do not prove the model selected the right support span.
reusable_by_other_labs: A future strict locator review can compare model-proposed offsets with reviewer-reconstructed offsets from pilots 003 and 004.
Artifact payloads can carry lab-local locator candidate metadata and locally computed quote hashes without changing protocol.
Use explicit model_asked_to_emit_quote_hashes=false and quote_hashes_computed_by=local_runner_from_candidate_offsets when separating model output from local verification.
do_not_repeat: Do not treat parseable JSON, locator coordinates, or locally computed quote hashes as method success before Goal 11D manual strict locator review.
Do not ask the model to emit cryptographic quote hashes in a future locator-candidate run.
Do not copy raw source text, raw model output, provider payloads, prompt traces, or generated synthesis metrics into currentness docs.
Do not substitute models or expand output contracts without a separate admission update.
research_note.evidence_disclaimer: This is a proposal-only live LLM pilot record, not validation, product evidence, strategy evidence, financial advice, live-trading authority, or architecture.
